metadata.name: ww-calendar
metadata.description: A feature-rich calendar component based on the FullCalendar library with multiple view types (year, month, week, day, list), event management with drag-and-drop and resize support, extensive styling customization, and timezone/locale support.
features: Multiple calendar views: year (multi-month), month (dayGrid), week (timeGrid), day (timeGrid), and list
Grouped events that move together via groupId
Internationalization with multiple locale support (en, fr, es, de, it, pt, ru, zh-cn, ja, ar)
Timezone support including local, UTC, and IANA timezone names
Formula-based event field mapping for flexible data binding
Customizable header toolbar with navigation buttons and view switchers
Today highlight and now indicator line
Hide weekends or specific days of the week
Configurable time range (start/end hours) for time grid views
All-day slot toggle for week and day views
Extensive color and typography customization for header, cells, buttons, borders, and events
Custom button labels with multilingual text support
Does not support inline event editing or event tooltips natively
Does not support recurring events natively — recurrence must be handled in the data source
Does not support multi-day time grid spanning — only dayGrid supports multi-day events visually

properties.name: fontFamily
properties.description: Font family for the entire calendar.

properties.name: fontSize
properties.description: Font size for the entire calendar.

properties.name: fontWeight
properties.description: Font weight for the entire calendar text.

properties.name: headerBackgroundColor
properties.description: Background color of the header toolbar area.

properties.name: headerTextColor
properties.description: Text color of the header toolbar title.

properties.name: headerHeight
properties.description: Height of the header toolbar.

properties.name: dayHeaderBackgroundColor
properties.description: Background color of the day header row (Mon, Tue, etc.).

properties.name: dayHeaderTextColor
properties.description: Text color of the day header row.

properties.name: dayHeaderHeight
properties.description: Height of the day header row.

properties.name: dayHeaderFontSize
properties.description: Font size of the day header text.

properties.name: dayHeaderFontWeight
properties.description: Font weight of the day header text.

properties.name: weekendTextColor
properties.description: Text color for weekend day numbers and headers.

properties.name: todayBackgroundColor
properties.description: Background color highlighting today's cell.

properties.name: cellBackgroundColor
properties.description: Background color of regular calendar day cells.

properties.name: cellTextColor
properties.description: Text color of calendar day cells.

properties.name: otherMonthBackgroundColor
properties.description: Background color for days belonging to other months.

properties.name: otherMonthTextColor
properties.description: Text color for days belonging to other months.

properties.name: timeGridBackgroundColor
properties.description: Background color of the time grid area in week/day views.

properties.name: buttonBackgroundColor
properties.description: Background color of navigation and view switcher buttons.

properties.name: buttonTextColor
properties.description: Text color of navigation and view switcher buttons.

properties.name: buttonHoverBackgroundColor
properties.description: Background color of buttons on hover.

properties.name: buttonHoverTextColor
properties.description: Text color of buttons on hover.

properties.name: buttonActiveBackgroundColor
properties.description: Background color of the currently active view button.

properties.name: buttonActiveTextColor
properties.description: Text color of the currently active view button.

properties.name: buttonBorderRadius
properties.description: Border radius of navigation and view buttons.

properties.name: todayButtonBackgroundColor
properties.description: Background color of the 'Today' button specifically. Falls back to buttonBackgroundColor if null.

properties.name: todayButtonTextColor
properties.description: Text color of the 'Today' button specifically. Falls back to buttonTextColor if null.

properties.name: todayButtonHoverBackgroundColor
properties.description: Hover background color of the 'Today' button. Falls back to buttonHoverBackgroundColor if null.

properties.name: todayButtonHoverTextColor
properties.description: Hover text color of the 'Today' button. Falls back to buttonHoverTextColor if null.

properties.name: borderColor
properties.description: Color of calendar grid borders.

properties.name: defaultEventBackgroundColor
properties.description: Default background color for events that do not specify their own.

properties.name: defaultEventBorderColor
properties.description: Default border color for events that do not specify their own.

properties.name: defaultEventTextColor
properties.description: Default text color for events that do not specify their own.

properties.name: nowIndicatorColor
properties.description: Color of the current time indicator line in time grid views.

properties.name: disableInteractions
properties.description: When enabled, disables all user interactions (click, drag, resize) on the calendar.

properties.name: showHeader
properties.description: Show or hide the header toolbar with navigation buttons and view switchers.

properties.name: locale
properties.description: Locale for the calendar interface language. 'auto' uses the app's current language.

properties.name: timezone
properties.description: Timezone for displaying event times. Accepts 'local', 'UTC', or IANA timezone names.

properties.name: defaultView
properties.description: The initial calendar view displayed on load.

properties.name: yearView
properties.description: Enable or disable the year (multi-month) view option.

properties.name: monthView
properties.description: Enable or disable the month view option.

properties.name: weekView
properties.description: Enable or disable the week view option.

properties.name: dayView
properties.description: Enable or disable the day view option.

properties.name: listView
properties.description: Enable or disable the list view option.

properties.name: allDaySlot
properties.description: Show or hide the all-day slot in week and day time grid views.

properties.name: timeStart
properties.description: Start time for the time grid display in HH:MM:SS format.

properties.name: timeEnd
properties.description: End time for the time grid display in HH:MM:SS format.

properties.name: hideWeekends
properties.description: Hide Saturday and Sunday from the calendar.

properties.name: startWeekOnSunday
properties.description: When enabled, the week starts on Sunday instead of Monday.

properties.name: hideDaysOfWeek
properties.description: Array of day numbers (0=Sunday to 6=Saturday) to hide from the calendar.

properties.name: events
properties.description: Array of event objects to display on the calendar. Each event should have at least id, title, start, and end fields. Use the formula properties to map custom field names.

properties.name: eventsIdFormula
properties.description: Formula to extract the event ID from each event object. Uses context.mapping to access event fields.

properties.name: eventsTitleFormula
properties.description: Formula to extract the event title from each event object.

properties.name: eventsStartFormula
properties.description: Formula to extract the event start date/time from each event object. Should return an ISO date string.

properties.name: eventsEndFormula
properties.description: Formula to extract the event end date/time from each event object. Should return an ISO date string.

properties.name: eventsAllDayFormula
properties.description: Formula to determine if an event is an all-day event. Should return a boolean.

properties.name: eventsBackgroundColorFormula
properties.description: Formula to extract per-event background color. Returns a color string or null to use default.

properties.name: eventsBorderColorFormula
properties.description: Formula to extract per-event border color. Returns a color string or null to use default.

properties.name: eventsTextColorFormula
properties.description: Formula to extract per-event text color. Returns a color string or null to use default.

properties.name: eventsContentFormula
properties.description: Formula to extract additional content/description from each event object.

properties.name: eventsDataFormula
properties.description: Formula to extract custom data object from each event for use in event handlers.

properties.name: eventsGroupIdFormula
properties.description: Formula to extract the group ID from each event. Events sharing a groupId move together on drag.

properties.name: buttonTextToday
properties.description: Custom label for the 'Today' button. Leave empty for the default locale label.

properties.name: buttonTextYear
properties.description: Custom label for the 'Year' view button. Leave empty for the default locale label.

properties.name: buttonTextMonth
properties.description: Custom label for the 'Month' view button. Leave empty for the default locale label.

properties.name: buttonTextWeek
properties.description: Custom label for the 'Week' view button. Leave empty for the default locale label.

properties.name: buttonTextDay
properties.description: Custom label for the 'Day' view button. Leave empty for the default locale label.

properties.name: buttonTextList
properties.description: Custom label for the 'List' view button. Leave empty for the default locale label.

properties.name: noEventsText
properties.description: Custom text displayed when there are no events in the list view.

events.name: eventClick
events.description: Triggered when clicking on a calendar event.

events.name: viewChange
events.description: Triggered when the calendar view changes (e.g., month to week).

events.name: eventCreated
events.description: Triggered when the user selects a date/time range to create a new event.

events.name: eventUpdated
events.description: Triggered when an event is modified (via drag or resize).

events.name: eventDragStart
events.description: Triggered when the user starts dragging an event.

events.name: eventDragEnd
events.description: Triggered when the user stops dragging an event (before it is dropped).

events.name: eventDrop
events.description: Triggered when an event is dropped after dragging to a new position.

events.name: eventResizeStart
events.description: Triggered when the user starts resizing an event.

events.name: eventResize
events.description: Triggered when an event is resized to a new duration.

actions.label: Change view
actions.description: Switch the calendar to a different view type.

actions.label: Go to date
actions.description: Navigate the calendar to a specific date.

actions.label: Next period
actions.description: Navigate to the next period (month, week, day, etc.) based on the current view.

actions.label: Previous period
actions.description: Navigate to the previous period (month, week, day, etc.) based on the current view.

actions.label: Go to today
actions.description: Navigate the calendar back to today's date.

variables.name: currentView
variables.description: The currently active calendar view type (e.g., dayGridMonth, timeGridWeek).

variables.name: selectedEvent
variables.description: The last clicked event object, containing id, title, start, end, allDay, and original event data.

specifications: CRITICAL: Apply a fixed height to the calendar element. Do not use flex or min-height directly on it.
When creating test events, place them within the current year/month/week timeframe so they are visible.
All formula properties (eventsIdFormula, eventsTitleFormula, etc.) use 'context.mapping?.['fieldName']' syntax to access event fields.
The events array should contain objects with at least id, title, start, and end fields. Use formula properties to map custom field names.
Event dates should be in ISO 8601 format (e.g., '2026-03-11T10:00:00').
The calendar defaults to the app locale when locale is set to 'auto'.
